_meta.description: Append-only archive of completed tasks. Do not edit manually. Maintained by ai_status.py archive command.

tasks.title: Phase 1 foundation audit-notification slice
tasks.summary_zh: 建立 Phase 1 foundation governance API、append-only audit read model、notification read path 與 contracts scaffold。
tasks.next: Finalized Phase 1 foundation audit-notification child slice after review approval.
review_notes_zh: contracts 與 foundation endpoints 對齊 Phase 1 hard rules
audit append-only 與 notification read 路徑已 smoke 驗證
webhook delivery 與 signed-download policy 仍保留在後續 slice

tasks.title: Owned order-dispatch-driver execution loop
tasks.summary_zh: 建立 owned standard_taxi / business_dispatch 的最小可運行 order、dispatch、driver-task API 與 regulatory eligibility baseline。
tasks.next: Finalized the owned order-dispatch-driver execution loop after review approval.

tasks.title: Callcenter and CTI correlation baseline
tasks.summary_zh: 建立 call_session、recording callback、pending-recording phone order 與 CTI 關聯基線。
tasks.next: Finalized Wave 3 callcenter/CTI baseline after Claude review approval and full repo validation.
review_notes_zh: callcenter session, recording callback, phone order pending-to-ready transition all passed unit and HTTP smoke|contracts imports and exactOptionalPropertyTypes issues were normalized on mainline

tasks.title: Complaint case lifecycle baseline
tasks.summary_zh: 建立 complaint case、timeline、reopen 與 SLA breach 告警基線。
tasks.next: Finalized Wave 3 complaint baseline after Claude review approval and full repo validation.
review_notes_zh: complaint create/list/get/timeline/reopen/sla-breach behavior passed unit and HTTP smoke|SLA breach stays append-only and does not overwrite the primary complaint status

tasks.title: Billing and settlement baseline
tasks.summary_zh: 建立 tenant billing profile、tenant invoice、driver fee plan、driver statement、reimbursement baseline。
tasks.next: Finalized Wave 4 billing baseline after Claude review approval and full repo/runtime validation.
review_notes_zh: tenant billing profile, invoice generation, driver statements, reimbursement semantics all passed unit and HTTP smoke|mainline review confirmed fee plan immutability and payout data shape are stable for Wave 4 baseline

tasks.title: Reporting and filing baseline
tasks.summary_zh: 建立 report job、artifact、filing package、manifest/hash baseline。
tasks.next: Finalized Wave 5 reporting/filing baseline after Claude review approval and full repo/runtime validation.
review_notes_zh: report job, dispatch recording index export, filing package manifest/hash all passed unit and HTTP smoke|mainline review added owned mobility feed wiring so SC-034 works through the root app

tasks.title: Forwarder mirror and relay baseline
tasks.summary_zh: 建立 forwarder adapter、inbound mirror、broadcast relay、accept relay、native status sync baseline。
tasks.next: Finalized Wave 6 forwarder baseline after Claude review approval and full repo/runtime validation.
review_notes_zh: forwarder mirror, broadcast, accept relay, status sync, and adapter health all passed unit and HTTP smoke|mainline review confirmed forwarded lifecycle stays isolated from owned dispatch and does not create owned assignments

tasks.title: Persistence and migration alignment
tasks.summary_zh: 把 in-memory Phase 1 slices 落到 PostgreSQL、migration packs、repositories，建立 forward-only persistence 真值。
tasks.next: Finalized Wave 7 persistence and migration alignment after Qwen review approval. All 8 modules import DatabaseModule, register repositories, rehydrate on init, write through to Postgres. 6 non-blocking observations documented. Zero blocking issues. Validated: 12 test files (60 tests), typecheck, lint all passed.

tasks.title: Auth and RBAC hardening
tasks.summary_zh: 建立 auth middleware、realm/scope/RBAC enforcement，補 platform/tenant/ops/driver 權限邊界。
tasks.next: Finalized Wave 7 auth and RBAC hardening baseline after Claude review approval and repo-level validation.
review_notes_zh: bootstrap request identity 會解析 actor, realm, roles, scopes 並保護關鍵 API 群組|缺 headers 或 scope 不足時會回傳結構化 auth error envelope|unit suite 與 API lint/typecheck 已通過

tasks.title: Client integration and feature-flag rollout
tasks.summary_zh: 將 tenant portal、ops console、driver app 接上 Phase 1 API，補 feature flags、read models 與 smoke paths。
tasks.next: Finalized Wave 8 client integration and feature-flag rollout after Claude review approval. Tenant portal, ops console, and driver app are wired to Phase 1 API/runtime truth; tenant override readback works through getAll/getByKey/isEnabled; centralized getList() envelope unwrapping covers client surfaces; ops callcenter and complaint pages are API-backed; 16/16 client-integration tests passed. Non-blocking cleanup note: redundant .items fallback remains harmless in two ops pages.

tasks.title: Backfill, UAT, and rollout packs
tasks.summary_zh: 建立 backfill、UAT、pilot、production rollout runbooks 與驗證腳本。
tasks.next: Finalized Wave 8 backfill/UAT/rollout packs after Qwen review approval. Revalidated docs/03-runbooks/phase1-rollout.md plus scripts/phase1-rollout-verify.sh, confirmed bash -n clean, and reran root pnpm dry-run entrypoints for backfill, uat, pilot, and production. The repo still documents /api/admin/flags as a manual rollout coordination gap until W8-001A lands.

tasks.title: Webhook and artifact runtime hardening
tasks.summary_zh: 把 webhook delivery、retry policy、signed download、retention 與 audit evidence 實作成真實 runtime。
tasks.next: Finalized Wave 7 webhook and artifact runtime hardening baseline after Claude review approval and repo-level validation.
review_notes_zh: webhook endpoint 現在保留 retry policy、rotation history 與 delivery runtime metadata|artifact 與 invoice download 已統一走 controlled signing metadata|targeted unit tests 與 API lint/typecheck 已通過

tasks.title: Wire contract and async job conformance
tasks.summary_zh: 將 API、webhook、download、report、filing 的 wire contract 正規化為 canonical snake_case，並補齊 async job 邊界與序列化一致性。
tasks.next: Finalized Wave 7 wire contract and async job conformance after Codex review approval. Global SnakeCaseExceptionFilter wired for guard/service error paths; SnakeCaseInterceptor retained for success responses. Both HTTP wire paths (success + error) now serialize canonical snake_case. Validated: wire-contract-conformance tests, snake-case-runtime tests, pnpm lint, and @drts/api typecheck all passed.
review_notes_zh: 補上全域 SnakeCaseExceptionFilter，讓 guard/service 的 HttpException 與 ApiRequestError 也輸出 canonical snake_case
保留 APP_INTERCEPTOR 處理成功回應，success/error 兩條 HTTP wire path 現在都對齊 W7-001D 目標
驗證完成：tests/unit/wire-contract-conformance.test.ts、apps/api/tests/unit/snake-case-runtime.test.ts、pnpm run lint、pnpm --filter @drts/api typecheck 全數通過

tasks.title: Dispatch and booking target-state completion
tasks.summary_zh: 補齊 reservation scheduler、queue/rank、owned order cancel、booking update/cancel 與 business_dispatch 目標流程，讓派單與預約語意符合 Phase 1 規格。
tasks.next: Finalized W8-001C dispatch and booking target-state completion after Qwen review approval. Owned-mobility now supports tenant booking list/get/update/cancel with SLA windows, passenger order cancel with dispatch state cleanup, reservation hold + escalation semantics (redispatch_queue vs exception_hold), and dispatch queue check-in/check-out with persisted trace events. Validated with pnpm test:unit (69 tests), pnpm --filter @drts/api typecheck, and targeted eslint on owned-mobility files.

tasks.title: Tenant, regulatory, and admin source-of-truth completion
tasks.summary_zh: 補齊 tenant/partner、regulatory、platform admin 的 canonical 主資料責任，包含 passenger/address book、tenant roles/api keys、contract/insurance/exclusivity、placard/public-info versioning 等。
tasks.next: Finalized Wave 8 tenant, regulatory, and admin source-of-truth completion after Qwen review approval and full repo validation. Tenant-partner owns passengers, addresses, tenant users/roles, API keys, webhook metadata, SLA profiles, and audit writes. Regulatory-registry owns contract, insurance, exclusivity runtime truth with eligibility flag updates. Platform-admin owns public-info versioning and placard versioning APIs with immutable publish audit. V0013 snapshot migration added. All 64 unit tests, typecheck, and lint passed.

tasks.title: Ops and driver domain completion
tasks.summary_zh: 補齊 ops 與 driver domain 的 Phase 1 目標流程，包含 incident、maintenance、shift/attendance、driver earnings/settings 以及對應 read models 與操作面。
tasks.next: Owner finalized approved task and closed it
review_notes_zh: 1) 單元測試 113/113 全綠（pnpm test:unit）
2) API client updateIncident 已改用 PATCH；IncidentController 也提供 @Patch（packages/api-client/src/index.ts:451, apps/api/src/modules/incident/incident.controller.ts）
3) Driver earnings 畫面已改用 statementId 與正確欄位（apps/driver-app/app/earnings.tsx）
4) Ops Maintenance 欄位映射與回傳型別一致（apps/ops-console-web/app/maintenance/page.tsx）
5) 備註：root typecheck:root 仍會因測試匯入 Nest 檔案而報 decorators 錯誤；套件內（apps/api）typecheck 皆通過，建議後續於根 tsconfig 開啟 experimentalDecorators 或避免在 tests 直接匯入裝飾器來源──此項不阻擋 W8-001E。
tasks.commit_subject: feat(w8-001e): finalize ops and driver domain completion
